# Third-Party Dependencies

## UxPlay

UxPlay provides the AirPlay mirror/audio receiver implementation.

- Fork used by this project: https://github.com/ZC635/UxPlay.git
- Upstream project: https://github.com/FDH2/UxPlay
- Pinned commit: 48b2b988e7083fffb1db9e0aa9a7d8bb955bc9a5
- License: GPLv3 or later
- Windows requirements: MSYS2/MinGW, GStreamer, Bonjour SDK/runtime

The submodule is pinned to the commit above for reproducible builds. The fork keeps the project-specific UxPlay commits available for fresh clones.
